scripts.dev: npm run build:shared && concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @los-aguachiles/api" "npm run dev --workspace @los-aguachiles/web"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace @los-aguachiles/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:shared && npm run dev --workspace @los-aguachiles/web
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @los-aguachiles/api && npm run build --workspace @los-aguachiles/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @los-aguachiles/api
scripts.build:api:deploy: npm run build:shared && npm run generate --workspace @los-aguachiles/api && npm run build --workspace @los-aguachiles/api
scripts.build:web: npm run build:shared && npm run build --workspace @los-aguachiles/web
